status_detail: MAJOR PROGRESS vs #627. Engine intercept fires RELIABLY post reload_services. Body 842 bytes (vs #627's 4kB+ bypass). B34 native schema delivered correctly with BLOCKED diagnostic IDs. Response body verbatim first 500 chars: `)]}'\n842\n[["wrb.fr",null,"[null,[\"c_BLOCKED\",\"r_BLOCKED\"],null,null,[[\"rc_BLOCKED\",[\"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\\n\\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.\"],null,null,null,null,true,null,[1],\"ko\",null,null,[null,null,null,null,null,null,[0],[]],null,null,true,null,null,null,null,null,[false],null,false,[],true,null,null,[]]],null,null,...`. inner_json shape matches native `[null,[c_id,r_id],null,null,[[rc_id,[<text>],...]]` pattern. Korean + English warning text in correct rc_BLOCKED slot. HOWEVER warning NOT rendered in UI: page remained on welcome/splash screen; no chat conversation history materialized; no warning bubble visible; prompt textarea still holds the original PII text (renderer never accepted response into UI state). Hypothesis: c_BLOCKED/r_BLOCKED/rc_BLOCKED placeholder strings (where real conversation/response hashes belong) cause downstream BardChatUi state-machine validation to silently drop response.
warning_text_excerpt: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.
response_headers_count: not extractable from DevTools DOM (shadow root) -- see 04_response_headers.png
header_names_seen: from PNG only (DOM-inaccessible) -- General shows Request URL / Method POST / Status 200 / Remote Address / Referrer Policy
server_header_present: not determinable from DOM extraction (must read 04_response_headers.png) -- but body content (842 bytes B34 schema with BLOCKED IDs) confirms intercept fired
response_body_first_500_chars_pattern_ma: BLOCKED diagnostic IDs (c_BLOCKED, r_BLOCKED, rc_BLOCKED) -- proof of B34 engine output, NOT Gemini real response
progress_vs_627: BETTER -- #627 was full bypass (4kB+ response with real c_<hash>/r_<hash> session IDs; engine saw PII but block_session never fired). #628 fires intercept reliably and emits B34 native-shape body with diagnostic BLOCKED IDs and both KR + EN warning text in the correct rc_BLOCKED slot. Engine → intercept → body-rewrite path is working post reload_services.
breakthrough_status: intercept fires with BLOCKED IDs but UI broken -- B34 schema delivered correctly per spec, but BardChatUi renderer rejected/ignored the response.
root_cause_hypothesis: BardChatUi renderer state machine likely validates c_<hash>/r_<hash>/rc_<hash> as session identifiers. The c_BLOCKED/r_BLOCKED/rc_BLOCKED placeholder strings (where real conversation/response hashes belong) cause silent rejection -- response is parsed structurally but not appended to chat pane UI state. Need to either (a) preserve real session IDs from the intercepted request and only swap message text + rc_BLOCKED slot, OR (b) generate fake-but-valid 16-char hex IDs matching c_<16hex>/r_<16hex>/rc_<16hex> pattern, OR (c) carry through whatever conversation-bootstrap fields the renderer requires (the long_tail metadata may also need real values).
recommendation_for_dev: B35 priority A: replace literal 'BLOCKED' strings with VALID-format hex IDs. Generate at intercept time: c_<16hex>, r_<16hex>, rc_<16hex>. Reuse same IDs across handshake/text/completion chunks of one response.
B35 priority B: examine if request body carries an existing conversation_id; if yes, preserve it (echo back) so renderer treats response as continuation of the existing session.

Compare files/628/response_body.txt (842B BLOCKED) vs files/626/response_body.txt (19045B native) to identify any other long_tail metadata field BardChatUi requires (the [null,null,null,null,null,null,[0],[]] block, the [false] block, etc.)
B35 should ALSO emit the handshake chunk first (160-byte initial chunk like in #626) before the text chunk -- B34 may be skipping the 3-chunk pattern.
After B35 fix, expect SUCCESS (warning bubble renders + chat thread created).

Engine log correlation: grep [APF:gemini3_diag] in /var/log/etap.log for f.sid=1196592496495539357 / reqid=3353702 between 14:55-14:59 KST 2026-04-28. Should now show block_session firing (was missing in #627).
errors_observed: UI: welcome screen remained, prompt stuck in input box, no chat thread created
Body parses structurally but renderer never appends warning to chat pane
artifacts: files/628/response_body.txt (851 bytes -- B34 schema with BLOCKED IDs)
notes: Cycle 95 Phase B B34 retry post reload_services. PARTIAL with intercept-layer breakthrough (vs #627 bypass). Schema delivered per B34 spec but UI rejects literal 'BLOCKED' placeholder IDs. Subagent 4m, within 5min soft.
